title: Katana
description: Add a Katana and more in your world !
body:
The Art of the **Katana**

Elevate your combat style in Minecraft with **Katana**. This mod introduces a series of precision-forged Katanas, offering a fast and elegant alternative to traditional swords.

Key Features:

- **New Weapons**: Multiple Katana variants (Wood, Stone, Iron, Gold, Diamond, and Netherite).
- **Attack Speed**: Katanas have a higher attack speed than vanilla swords, making them perfect for combos.
- **Clean Design**: Detailed models and textures that fit seamlessly into the Minecraft aesthetic.
